Communications · CentralHub

Mail Composer

Send newsletters and announcements to teachers across the network. Filter by school, preview before sending, and track campaign history.

Access Restricted

Mail Composer is available to central_admin only.

← Back to Dashboard

Recipients

All—
Teachers Hub—
Academic Hub—
Central Hub—
Research Hub—
Role
All Users Admins
Sub-role
Loading…

Subject Line

Appears as the email subject in the inbox 0 / 150

Campaign Name (internal label for history)

Email Body

0 words

Saved Templates (reuse subject & body)

Loading templates…

Campaign History

Campaign Sent Delivered Failed Status
Loading history…
—
recipients selected
  • Registered teachers —
  • Manual contacts —
Available merge tags
Click to copy. Use these in your subject or body — each recipient receives their own value.

Tips

  • ✓ Use Preview before sending
  • ✓ Send Test to yourself first
  • ✓ Select specific schools for targeted campaigns
  • ✓ Add unregistered teachers via Teacher Contacts

Email Preview

Send Test Email

Save as Template

Subject line and email body will be saved. Recipients and campaign name are not.

Import recipients

Paste emails (one per line, or comma/semicolon separated) — or upload a .txt / .csv file. Optional name format: Name <email@x.com> or Name,email@x.com (CSV). For Excel: Save As → CSV (Comma delimited), then upload the .csv.

No file selected

Upload a CSV where the first column is the email address and the remaining columns are merge-tag fields. Header row is required — column names become {{tag}} placeholders you can use in the subject and body. Example: email,password,examUrl → use {{password}} and {{examUrl}} in your message.
Always available: {{email}} and {{name}} work in every campaign — no need to add them as columns.

No file selected

Recipients

0 selected

Confirm campaign send

This will email everyone in the recipient list. Review carefully.

Recipients—
Audience—
Subject—
Personalized —
FromEduversal Education <noreply@eduversal.org>

Campaign

—
